name: CleanScape Masters
author: Poki
description: CleanScape Masters is a destress game where your mission is simple: vacuum clean everything in sight! Each level takes you to a new setting, whether it’s sucking up cans, mowing down crops, or plowing through snow, your powerful machine is always ready for the job. Sell everything you collect for money, upgrade your skills, and unlock awesome new characters. Ready to clean, collect, and chill? How to play CleanScape Masters? Use WASD, arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created CleanScape Masters? CleanScape Masters is created by Gamebole Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Pool Merge Io and Car Detailing Master ! How can I play CleanScape Masters for free? You can play CleanScape Masters for free on Poki. Can I play CleanScape Masters on mobile devices and desktop? CleanScape Masters can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
